Train Cancellations.name: Zugausfälle
Train Cancellations.description: Züge ausfallend oder erheblich verspätet mit unzureichender Vorankündigung oder Entschädigung

Train Ticket Prices.name: Zugfahrkartpreise
Train Ticket Prices.description: Bahnfahrkarten zu teuer, Erhöhungen über der Inflationsrate, inkonsistente Preisgestaltung

Flight Delays.name: Flugverspätungen
Flight Delays.description: Flüge verspätet oder storniert, schlechte Kommunikation, Schwierigkeiten bei Schadensersatzansprüchen

Lost Luggage.name: Verlorenes Gepäck
Lost Luggage.description: Taschen kommen am Ziel nicht an, langsame Verfolgung, unzureichende Entschädigung

Bus Route Cuts.name: Buslinienkürzungen
Bus Route Cuts.description: Strecken storniert, Fahrtfrequenz reduziert, ländliche Gemeinden verlieren Bushaltestellen

Pothole Damage.name: Schäden durch Schlaglöcher
Pothole Damage.description: Schlaglöcher beschädigen Fahrzeuge und gefährden Radfahrer, Gemeinden reparieren langsam

Parking Fines.name: Parkgebühren
Parking Fines.description: Unfaire private Parkgebühren, aggressive Durchsetzung, verwirrende Beschilderung

Fuel Prices.name: Kraftstoffpreise
Fuel Prices.description: Benzin- und Dieselpreise zu hoch, sinken langsam wenn Großhandelspreise fallen

Broadband Speed.name: Breitbandgeschwindigkeit
Broadband Speed.description: Internetgeschwindigkeit weit unter beworbener und bezahlter Geschwindigkeit

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: Mobilfunkabdeckungslücken
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.description: Kein Mobilfunksignal in Häusern, Arbeitsplätzen oder entlang von Transportstrecken

Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: Preiserhöhungen während laufender Verträge
Price Rises Mid-Contract.description: Telefon-, Breitband- und TV-Rechnungen steigen während gebundener Verträge

Customer Service Hold Times.name: Wartezeiten beim Kundenservice
Customer Service Hold Times.description: Stundenlang in der Warteschleife, um mit einem Menschen zu sprechen

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: Schwierigkeiten beim Kündigen von Abos
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.description: Unternehmen machen es absichtlich schwer, Abos zu kündigen oder abzubestellen

Roaming Charges.name: Roaming-Gebühren
Roaming Charges.description: Unerwartete Mobilfunkgebühren bei Reisen ins Ausland, Preiserhöhungen nach dem Brexit

Energy Bill Costs.name: Energierechnungskosten
Energy Bill Costs.description: Gas- und Stromrechnungen unbezahlbar, Preisdeckel immer noch zu hoch

Water Bill Increases.name: Wasserbillerhöhungen
Water Bill Increases.description: Wasserbillerhöhungen scharf während die Servicequalität sinkt

Sewage in Rivers.name: Abwasser in Flüssen
Sewage in Rivers.description: Wasserversorgungsunternehmen kippen Rohklärabwasser in Gewässer und Strände

Smart Meter Problems.name: Smart-Meter-Probleme
Smart Meter Problems.description: Smart Meter funktionieren nicht, verlieren Funktionalität nach Anbieter-Wechsel

Bank Branch Closures.name: Bankfilialschließungen
Bank Branch Closures.description: Lokale Bankfilialen schließen, Gemeinden ohne Zugang hinterlassend

Hidden Bank Charges.name: Versteckte Bankgebühren
Hidden Bank Charges.description: Unerwartete Gebühren für Überziehungen, Auslandstransaktionen, Kontoverwaltung

Fraud and Scam Losses.name: Betrug- und Scam-Verluste
Fraud and Scam Losses.description: Banken weigern sich, Betrugsopfer und Opfer von Autorisierungs-Push-Payment-Scams zu erstatten

Insurance Claim Rejections.name: Versicherungsschadensersatzablehnungen
Insurance Claim Rejections.description: Ansprüche aus technischen Gründen abgelehnt nach Jahren von Prämienzahlungen

Mortgage Rate Shock.name: Hypothekenzinsschock
Mortgage Rate Shock.description: Festzinsen enden und wechseln zu viel höheren variablen Sätzen

Overseas Transfer Fees.name: Gebühren für Auslandstransfers
Overseas Transfer Fees.description: Übermäßige Gebühren und schlechte Wechselkurse für internationale Geldtransfers

NHS Waiting Times.name: NHS-Wartezeiten
NHS Waiting Times.description: Mehrmonatige oder mehrjährige Wartezeiten auf Operationen und Facharzttermine

GP Appointment Access.name: Zugang zu Allgemeinmedizinterterminen
GP Appointment Access.description: Kann sich nicht durchführen, um Allgemeinmedizintermine zu buchen, wochenlange Wartezeiten

Dentist Availability.name: Zahnarztverfügbarkeit
Dentist Availability.description: Unmöglich, einen NHS-Zahnarzt zu finden, der neue Patienten annimmt

Mental Health Service Waits.name: Wartezeiten für Psychische Gesundheit
Mental Health Service Waits.description: Mehrmonatige Wartezeiten auf Therapie und psychische Unterstützung

Prescription Costs.name: Rezeptkosten
Prescription Costs.description: Kosten pro Artikel zu hoch in England, Inkonsistenz zwischen Landesteilen des UK

Hospital Parking Charges.name: Krankenhausparkhausgebühren
Hospital Parking Charges.description: Zahlen zum Parken im Krankenhaus während man krank ist oder kranke Verwandte besucht

Rent Increases.name: Mieterhöhungen
Rent Increases.description: Private Miete steigt weit über Inflation, Gefahr von Kündigung ohne Grund

Council Tax Rises.name: Gemeindesteuererhöhungen
Council Tax Rises.description: Jährliche Gemeindesteuererhöhungen während lokale Dienstleistungen schlechter werden

Noisy Neighbours.name: Lärmende Nachbarn
Noisy Neighbours.description: Anhaltende Lärmstörung, Gemeinden handeln langsam, beeinflussen psychische Gesundheit

Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Änderungen bei Müllabfuhr
Rubbish Collection Changes.description: Reduzierte Müllabfuhren, verwirrende Recyclingregeln, überquellende Behälter

Planning Permission Abuse.name: Missbrauch von Baugenehmigungen
Planning Permission Abuse.description: Unerwünschte Entwicklungen genehmigt, Grünflächen bedroht, Gemeinde ignoriert

Damp and Mould in Housing.name: Feuchtigkeit und Schimmel in Wohnungen
Damp and Mould in Housing.description: Vermieter und Wohnungsbaugesellschaften beheben Feuchtigkeit und Schimmel nicht

Delivery Problems.name: Lieferprobleme
Delivery Problems.description: Pakete verloren, im Regen liegengelassen, als zugestellt markiert aber nicht erhalten

Shrinkflation.name: Schrumpfflation
Shrinkflation.description: Produkte werden kleiner während Preise gleich bleiben oder steigen

Refund Difficulties.name: Schwierigkeiten bei Rückerstattung
Refund Difficulties.description: Unternehmen machen Retouren und Rückerstattungen unnötig schwierig

Fake Reviews.name: Gefälschte Bewertungen
Fake Reviews.description: Kann Online-Bewertungen nicht vertrauen, gefälschte positive Bewertungen täuschen Verbraucher

Subscription Traps.name: Abofallen
Subscription Traps.description: Kostenlose Testversionen werden ohne klare Zustimmung bezahlend, schwer zu kündigen

Food Quality Decline.name: Rückgang der Lebensmittelqualität
Food Quality Decline.description: Fertiggerichte schlechtere Qualität, kleinere Portionen, mehr Zusatzstoffe

Cost of Childcare.name: Kosten für Kinderbetreuung
Cost of Childcare.description: Kinderbetreuungskosten unerschwinglich teuer, schränken Arbeitsfähigkeit ein

Student Loan Repayment.name: Rückzahlung von Studentendarlehen
Student Loan Repayment.description: Absolventen zahlen Jahrzehnte lang zurück, Schwellenwert- und Zinsänderungen

Dog Fouling.name: Hundeausscheidungen
Dog Fouling.description: Hundekot in öffentlichen Räumen, Parks und auf Gehwegen wird nicht aufgeräumt

AI Replacing Jobs.name: KI ersetzt Arbeitsplätze
AI Replacing Jobs.description: Angst vor künstlicher Intelligenz, die Arbeitsplätze automatisiert ohne Übergangshilfe

Avanti West Coast.name: Avanti West Coast
Avanti West Coast.description: UK-Eisenbahnbetreiber, der die West Coast Main Line bedient

Southern / Thameslink.name: Southern / Thameslink
Southern / Thameslink.description: UK-Eisenbahnbetreiber, der London und den Süden bedient

Northern Trains.name: Northern Trains
Northern Trains.description: UK-Eisenbahnbetreiber, der den Norden Englands bedient

LNER.name: LNER
LNER.description: UK-Eisenbahnbetreiber, der die East Coast Main Line bedient

Vodafone.name: Vodafone
Vodafone.description: Globales Telekommunikationsunternehmen mit Sitz in Großbritannien

Thames Water.name: Thames Water
Thames Water.description: Wasser- und Abwasserunternehmen für London und das Thames Valley

transport.agent_quote: Once helped a rioter file 6 refund claims during a single delayed journey. They made £47 before reaching Birmingham.
transport.agent_bio: Tracks cancellation patterns, handles refund paperwork, reviews every suggested action, and puts together evidence for regulator submissions. Crunches the numbers so rioters can focus on what matters.
transport.human_quote: My favourite Quiet Riot moment: watching Avanti's social media team scramble when 400 of us tweeted at the same time.
transport.human_bio: Regular commuter from Manchester who spent 3 years on the Avanti line before deciding enough was enough. Helps connect rioters on the same routes, shares what's working, and brings the human touch.
transport.goal: Help rioters hold UK transport companies to account on cancellations, delays, and pricing — and make sure everyone knows what they're entitled to.
transport.focus_detail: Building a dataset of cancellations with times, routes, and reasons to submit to the ORR. Currently tracking 340 cancellations reported by rioters this month.

telecoms.agent_quote: Ran speed tests for 200 rioters. Average was 18 Mbps. They were paying for 65.
telecoms.agent_bio: Analyses broadband speeds, compiles provider comparison data, and helps rioters build evidence for Ofcom. If your connection is slow, Pulse will prove it.
telecoms.human_quote: A whole street switched broadband together. The old provider sent 'please come back' letters to every house.
telecoms.human_bio: Tech-savvy Londoner who got fed up paying for broadband speeds that never materialised. Helps rioters compare providers, coordinate switches, and share speed test evidence.
telecoms.goal: Help rioters get the broadband and mobile service they're paying for — and know what to do when they don't.
telecoms.focus_detail: Collecting evidence from rioters hit by CPI+ increases to submit to Ofcom. 890 rioters affected across 4 providers.

energy.agent_quote: Helped a rioter calculate they'd overpaid £340 on estimated bills. The energy company's apology email was longer than the original contract.
energy.agent_bio: Analyses billing patterns, spots overcharges, and puts together evidence for regulator submissions. If your energy company is taking the mick, Spark will find the receipts.
energy.human_quote: A rioter got £340 back after we proved 2 years of overcharging. She cried on the phone.
energy.human_bio: Based in Bristol. Helps rioters challenge their bills, navigate switching, and gather evidence for Ofgem. Knows the energy market inside out.
energy.goal: Help rioters challenge unfair bills, switch smarter, and make sure energy companies play fair.
energy.focus_detail: Analysing 2 years of billing data from 340 rioters to identify systematic overcharging patterns for Ofgem submission.

water.agent_quote: Helped 200 rioters file sewage reports in one weekend. Thames Water's inbox needed its own inbox.
water.agent_bio: Monitors sewage discharge data, tracks water company performance, and compiles evidence for EA and Ofwat. Keeps an eye on every outlet and overflow.
water.human_quote: We got a beach reopened 3 weeks early by showing the sewage data was wrong.
water.human_bio: Surfer from Cornwall who got tired of sewage warnings closing his local beach. Helps rioters report discharges, gather water quality evidence, and coordinate with the EA.
water.goal: Help rioters hold water companies to account on sewage, bills, and service quality.
water.focus_detail: Mapping discharge events against company-reported data. 200 rioter reports suggest under-reporting at 3 outlets.

banking.agent_quote: Helped draft a complaint so thorough the bank called to apologise before it was even sent.
banking.agent_bio: Reviews bank charges, analyses fee structures, and helps build FCA complaint evidence. If there's a hidden fee, Chip will find it.
banking.human_quote: Barclays reversed a branch closure after 1,200 of us showed up to the consultation.
banking.human_bio: Former bank employee from Birmingham who saw how complaints actually get handled from the inside. Helps rioters write better complaints and navigate the system.
banking.goal: Help rioters deal with unfair charges, branch closures, and poor service from banks.
banking.focus_detail: Coordinating responses to 12 planned closures. Collecting impact statements from affected communities.

health.agent_quote: Helped find 3 NHS dentists accepting patients. The rioter thought I was making it up.
health.agent_bio: Tracks waiting times, finds availability, and helps rioters navigate the system. If there's a faster route to treatment, Cura will map it.
health.human_quote: A rioter used our letter template to get a referral fast-tracked. 18 months became 6 weeks.
health.human_bio: Nurse from Liverpool who's seen both sides of the NHS. Helps rioters navigate waiting lists, write effective letters, and share what actually moves the needle.
health.goal: Help rioters navigate NHS waiting times, find availability, and know what options they have.
health.focus_detail: Collecting call data from 500 rioters to build a picture of real-world access. Publishing findings to local health boards.

housing.agent_quote: Helped document 47 snags in a new build. The developer asked if they were a building inspector.
housing.agent_bio: Documents property issues, analyses landlord response times, and compiles evidence for housing ombudsman submissions. Every damp patch, every crack, logged.
housing.human_quote: Our damp evidence pack got so detailed the landlord fixed it before the council inspection.
housing.human_bio: Renter from London who's dealt with everything from damp to dodgy landlords. Helps rioters document issues properly and know what their options are.
housing.goal: Help rioters deal with landlords, councils, and housing issues — and know what they're entitled to.
housing.focus_detail: Helping rioters affected by no-fault evictions understand the new Renters Reform Act and what it means for them.

shopping.agent_quote: Tracked a 'delivered' parcel across 4 neighbours, a recycling bin, and a greenhouse. Found it.
shopping.agent_bio: Tracks delivery failures, compiles refund evidence, and spots pricing patterns. If your parcel is lost, Scout is already looking.
shopping.human_quote: Evri lost my parcel 3 times. Now I help others get their refunds faster than I ever did.
shopping.human_bio: Online shopping veteran from Edinburgh who's had more parcels go missing than she can count. Helps rioters get refunds, report sellers, and avoid the worst offenders.
shopping.goal: Help rioters get refunds, track lost parcels, and hold retailers and delivery companies to account.
shopping.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters to submit to Citizens Advice and Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Helped photograph the same pothole in 11 different weather conditions. The council finally gave in.
local.agent_bio: Maps local issues, tracks council response times, and compiles FOI requests. If your pothole has been there 6 months, Link has the evidence.
local.human_quote: The council fixed our road after we mapped every single pothole with photos. 11 months, but we got there.
local.human_bio: Community-minded Welshman from the Valleys who's been reporting the same potholes for years. Helps rioters document local issues and hold councils to account.
local.goal: Help rioters get local issues fixed — potholes, bins, planning, noise — and hold councils to account.
local.focus_detail: FOI requests sent to 30 councils comparing reported vs actual repair times. Publishing results as a league table.

other.agent_quote: Helped cancel a gym membership that took 3 calls, 2 emails, and a recorded delivery. The gym now has a cancel button.
other.agent_bio: Handles the issues that don't fit neatly elsewhere. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations — Flex finds the patterns and the pressure points.
other.human_quote: We got a gym chain to add a cancel button to their website. Only took 800 complaints.
other.human_bio: Product designer from London who got frustrated by how hard companies make it to leave. Helps rioters cancel subscriptions, avoid dark patterns, and share workarounds.
other.goal: Help rioters with the things that don't fit neatly elsewhere — subscriptions, refunds, and everyday frustrations.
other.focus_detail: Documenting the worst offenders and building template cancellation scripts for each.

insurance.agent_quote: Helped a rioter find the clause that turned a rejected home insurance claim into a £4,200 payout. The insurer's own policy proved them wrong.
insurance.agent_bio: Reviews policy wording, spots unfair rejection patterns, and builds evidence for Financial Ombudsman submissions. If your insurer is dodging a valid claim, Shield will find the leverage.
insurance.human_quote: Got 8 rioters with the same rejected claim type to submit together. The insurer settled all 8 within a fortnight.
insurance.human_bio: Former insurance industry worker from Leeds who knows how claims really get decided. Helps rioters write better appeals, understand policy jargon, and know when to escalate.
insurance.goal: Help rioters get fair treatment from insurers — and know what to do when a claim is unfairly rejected.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' cited in 40% of rejected claims — often incorrectly. Analysing 200 cases across 3 insurers for FOS evidence pack.

delivery.agent_quote: Traced a 'delivered' parcel through 6 different tracking statuses, 3 depots, and a neighbour's shed. Found it in 47 minutes.
delivery.agent_bio: Monitors courier performance, tracks delivery failure rates, and compiles evidence for consumer complaints. If your parcel has vanished, Track is already on it.
delivery.human_quote: Got DPD to change their photo-evidence policy in our area after 40 rioters submitted proof of parcels left in the rain.
delivery.human_bio: Online shopper from Glasgow who got tired of the 'we left it in a safe place' excuse. Helps rioters get refunds, report couriers, and avoid the worst offenders.
delivery.goal: Help rioters get their parcels delivered properly — and get refunds when they don't.
delivery.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters. Evri complaint rate: 23% — 3x higher than DPD. Building league table for Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Calculated that a Plan 2 borrower earning £30k would pay £47,000 in interest before the loan gets written off. The original loan was £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Analyses education costs, student loan projections, and funding entitlements. Crunches the numbers so students and graduates can make informed decisions.
education.human_quote: Helped 12 rioters claim back overpaid student loan repayments they didn't know about. Average refund: £340.
education.human_bio: Mature student from Birmingham who navigated the funding system twice. Helps rioters understand repayments, spot overpayments, and challenge threshold changes.
education.goal: Help students and graduates navigate education costs, loans, and repayments — and make sure they're not overpaying.
education.focus_detail: Identifying graduates who've been charged below the repayment threshold. 12 refunds processed so far — average £340 each.

environment.agent_quote: Cross-referenced 3 years of air quality data with hospital admission rates. The correlation was so clear the council couldn't ignore it.
environment.agent_bio: Tracks environmental data, monitors pollution levels, and compiles evidence for regulatory submissions. If the numbers tell a story, Fern will find it.
environment.human_quote: Got our local council to install air quality monitors after 200 rioters signed our evidence petition. Data changed everything.
environment.human_bio: Environmental science graduate from Bristol who believes in evidence-led change. Helps rioters document environmental issues and build cases that regulators can't ignore.
environment.goal: Help rioters document environmental problems and hold polluters and policymakers to account with data.
environment.focus_detail: Mapping areas with no air quality monitoring within 5km. 60% of rioter-reported pollution hotspots have no official monitoring.

employment.agent_quote: Compiled workplace AI implementation data from 300 rioters. 40% said changes happened with zero consultation. That's a pattern, not an anecdote.
employment.agent_bio: Analyses workplace trends, tracks policy changes, and helps rioters understand their protections. If your job is changing without consultation, Forge has the data.
employment.human_quote: Connected 30 rioters in the same industry facing AI changes. Turns out their companies were all using the same playbook — and the same loopholes.
employment.human_bio: HR professional from Manchester who switched sides after seeing how restructurings really work. Helps rioters understand their options and coordinate responses.
employment.goal: Help rioters navigate workplace changes, understand their protections, and respond collectively when jobs are at risk.
employment.focus_detail: Documenting cases where AI tools were introduced without staff consultation. Building evidence for a report on employer obligations.

tech.agent_quote: Found that 3 major apps were collecting location data even when permissions were set to 'never.' Filed complaints with the ICO for all of them.
tech.agent_bio: Monitors platform policies, tracks dark patterns, and helps rioters understand what tech companies are doing with their data. If an app is misbehaving, Glitch will catch it.
tech.human_quote: Organised a mass data subject access request to a social media company. When 500 people ask at once, they have to take it seriously.
tech.human_bio: Software developer from Edinburgh who got frustrated by the gap between what tech companies promise and what they deliver. Helps rioters exercise their data rights and spot dark patterns.
tech.goal: Help rioters push back against dark patterns, data misuse, and unfair tech practices.
tech.focus_detail: Auditing the top 50 apps for permission creep — requesting access they don't need. Building a report for the ICO.

Claim delay repay compensation.title: Entschädigung für Verspätungen einfordern
Claim delay repay compensation.description: Sie haben gesetzlichen Anspruch auf Entschädigung für Verspätungen von über 15 oder 30 Minuten, je nach Betreiber

Write to your MP about rail performance.title: Schreiben Sie an Ihren Abgeordneten zur Eisenbahnleistung
Write to your MP about rail performance.description: Musterbrief an Ihren Abgeordneten, der die Auswirkungen von Zugausfällen hervorhebt

Share your cancellation story.title: Teilen Sie Ihre Geschichte über Zugausfälle
Share your cancellation story.description: Helfen Sie anderen, die echten Auswirkungen zu verstehen — teilen Sie Ihre Erfahrung

Suggest improvements to timetabling.title: Schlagen Sie Verbesserungen bei der Fahrplangestaltung vor
Suggest improvements to timetabling.description: Was würde das wirklich beheben? Teilen Sie Ihre Ideen

Claim EU261 / UK261 compensation.title: EU261 / UK261-Entschädigung einfordern
Claim EU261 / UK261 compensation.description: Airlines müssen für Verspätungen über 3 Stunden bei berechtigten Flügen £220-520 zahlen

Document everything at the airport.title: Dokumentieren Sie alles am Flughafen
Document everything at the airport.description: Fotografieren Sie Abflugbretter, bewahren Sie Bordkarten auf, notieren Sie Zeiten

Rate your airline experience.title: Bewerten Sie Ihre Flugerfahrung
Rate your airline experience.description: Helfen Sie zukünftigen Passagieren zu wissen, was sie erwartet

Run and save speed test evidence.title: Führen Sie einen Speedtest durch und speichern Sie die Ergebnisse
Run and save speed test evidence.description: Verwenden Sie den Ofcom-Breitbandprüfer, um Ihre tatsächlichen Geschwindigkeiten im Vergleich zu beworbenen zu dokumentieren

Complain to Ofcom.title: Beschwerde bei Ofcom einreichen
Complain to Ofcom.description: Melden Sie Ihren Breitbandanbieter, da er die beworbenen Geschwindigkeiten nicht liefert

Switch to a better provider.title: Wechseln Sie zu einem besseren Anbieter
Switch to a better provider.description: Vergleichen Sie Breitbandangebote in Ihrer Gegend und wechseln Sie

Map your street's broadband speeds.title: Kartieren Sie die Breitbandgeschwindigkeiten in Ihrer Straße
Map your street's broadband speeds.description: Organisieren Sie Nachbarn, um alle Tests durchzuführen und zu teilen — kollektive Daten sind wertvoll

Check if you are on the cheapest tariff.title: Prüfen Sie, ob Sie den günstigsten Tarif haben
Check if you are on the cheapest tariff.description: Verwenden Sie von Ofgem akkreditierte Vergleichsseiten zum Überprüfen

Apply for the Warm Home Discount.title: Beantragen Sie den Warm Home Discount
Apply for the Warm Home Discount.description: Sie können möglicherweise £150 Rabatt auf Ihre Stromrechnung erhalten

Share energy saving tips.title: Teilen Sie Energiespartipps
Share energy saving tips.description: Was hilft wirklich, um Rechnungen zu senken? Teilen Sie mit der Gemeinde

Propose a community energy buying scheme.title: Schlagen Sie ein Energieeinkaufsschema für die Gemeinde vor
Propose a community energy buying scheme.description: Großmengen-Einkaufskraft als Gruppe könnte bessere Tarife erhalten

Report a sewage discharge.title: Melden Sie eine Abwassereinleitung
Report a sewage discharge.description: Verwenden Sie die Telefonleitung der Umweltagentur, um Abwasserverschmutzung zu melden

Check your local river quality.title: Überprüfen Sie die Qualität Ihres lokalen Flusses
Check your local river quality.description: Sehen Sie Echtzeitableitungsdaten für Ihre Gegend

Sign the petition for tougher regulation.title: Unterzeichnen Sie die Petition für strengere Vorschriften
Sign the petition for tougher regulation.description: Schließen Sie sich Tausenden an, die Veränderungen fordern

Organise a local river clean-up.title: Organisieren Sie eine lokale Flussreinigung
Organise a local river clean-up.description: Bringen Sie Menschen zusammen, um aufzuräumen und das Bewusstsein zu schärfen

Check your right to choose.title: Überprüfen Sie Ihr Wahlrecht
Check your right to choose.description: Sie haben das Recht zu wählen, welches Krankenhaus Sie überwiesen werden — kürzere Wartezeiten können verfügbar sein

Contact PALS at your hospital.title: Kontaktieren Sie PALS in Ihrem Krankenhaus
Contact PALS at your hospital.description: Der Patient Advice and Liaison Service kann Ihnen helfen, Ihren Fall zu eskalieren

Share your waiting story.title: Teilen Sie Ihre Wartegeschichte
Share your waiting story.description: Echte Geschichten erzeugen Druck für Veränderungen — Ihre Erfahrung ist wichtig

Know your rights to a GP appointment.title: Kennen Sie Ihre Rechte auf einen Hausarzttermin
Know your rights to a GP appointment.description: Praxen müssen Notfalltermine anbieten — wissen Sie, was Sie fragen sollten

Complain to NHS England about GP access.title: Beschwerde bei NHS England über Hausartzugang einreichen
Complain to NHS England about GP access.description: Formelle Beschwerde erzeugen eine Papierspur, die Veränderungen antreibt

Claim compensation for lost parcel.title: Entschädigung für verlorenes Paket einfordern
Claim compensation for lost parcel.description: Der Absender ist verantwortlich — kontaktieren Sie ihn, nicht den Kurier

Film your delivery location.title: Filmen Sie Ihren Lieferort
Film your delivery location.description: Videobeweis, wo Pakete abgelegt werden, hilft bei Ansprüchen

Rate your delivery driver.title: Bewerten Sie Ihren Lieferboten
Rate your delivery driver.description: Helfen Sie dabei, Muster zu identifizieren — gute und schlechte

Check if you can reclaim charges.title: Überprüfen Sie, ob Sie Gebühren erstatten können
Check if you can reclaim charges.description: Sie können möglicherweise unfaire Überziehungsgebühren erstatten

Switch to a fee-free bank account.title: Wechseln Sie zu einem kostenfreien Bankkonto
Switch to a fee-free bank account.description: Vergleichen Sie Konten ohne monatliche Gebühren oder versteckte Kosten

Appeal your parking charge.title: Legen Sie Einspruch gegen Ihre Parkgebühr ein
Appeal your parking charge.description: Die meisten privaten Parkgebühren können erfolgreich angefochten werden

Check if the signage was adequate.title: Überprüfen Sie, ob die Beschilderung angemessen war
Check if the signage was adequate.description: Unklare Schilder sind Gründe für Einspruch — fotografieren Sie alles

Know your rights on rent increases.title: Kennen Sie Ihre Rechte bei Mieterhöhungen
Know your rights on rent increases.description: Ihr Vermieter muss den ordentlichen Rechtsweg einhalten

Contact Shelter for free advice.title: Kontaktieren Sie Shelter für kostenlose Beratung

Share your rent increase story.title: Teilen Sie Ihre Mieterhöhungsgeschichte
Share your rent increase story.description: Kollektive Geschichten treiben politische Veränderungen voran

Check your repayment plan.title: Überprüfen Sie Ihren Rückzahlungsplan
Check your repayment plan.description: Stellen Sie sicher, dass Sie den richtigen Plan haben

Campaign for reform.title: Kampagnen für Reformen
